meaning: n.架设棚架,作棚架用的材料
examples: My first job was working at the Ukiah Library when I was 16 years old. It was a dream job and I did everything from shelving books to reading to the children for story time.
Image above: This is our messy shelving in the studio.
Now shelving and storage units are being snapped up.
By shelving Concord, Estrada cleared the decks to fight for piecemeal, but just as necessary, reforms.
Think Tall: When installing bookshelves, or any shelving for that matter, purchase something that will reach the ceiling.
